items.title: Apple hires veteran Google VP to lead AI product marketing
items.summary:
Apple has hired Google VP Lilian Rincon as its new vice president of Product Marketing for AI, the company tells me. 
Apple says Rincon will lead product marketing and product management for its AI platforms, including Apple Intelligence and Siri. She will report directly to Greg Joswiak, Apple’s se
items.title_translated: 苹果聘请谷歌资深副总裁领导人工智能产品营销

苹果公司告诉我，该公司已聘请谷歌副总裁 Lilian Rincon 担任新任人工智能产品营销副总裁。 
苹果表示，Rincon 将领导其人工智能平台的产品营销和产品管理，包括 Apple Intelligence 和 Siri。她将直接向苹果公司销售总监 Greg Joswiak 汇报工作。
